text:
Once upon a quiet afternoon in suburbia lived an owl. This owl wasn't your typical nocturnal creature. Every morning it would wake up in somebody's attic reading books on birds. That's where Owl knew stuff.

One year orbited a special holiday. People liked parties. They especially loved mystery parties. So Owl decided to throw one.

First guests arrived late afternoon. They were talking games.

"Why does that skull whistle?"

"We think she's dead."

"Well!"

"You think maybe she hears jazz?"

"You know that."

Then there was a knock.

"Lemon lime?"

"Mmm."

The host flew down.

"A ghost?"

"Nope."

Just old friends. Had been friends since owl school.

After dinner they danced.

One guy wouldn't let go.

"What about you?"

She shook him.

"I see stars."

They disappeared.

A couple weeks later.

"I know someone."

"You did."

An old friend.

"The detective."

"Hmm."

One midnight cold.

They heard footsteps.

"Aren't
